title: cytisus ovatus
intro: Cytisus ovatus, also known as the Broom or Purple Broom, is a flowering plant species in the pea family Fabaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Cytisus ovatus include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments.
